Gauge Configuration

Manage gauge display settings and operational parameters for this station.

Gauge Range in Gauge Details

Enable or disable gauge range in gauge details visualization.

Actual pressure *2

Enable or disable actual pressure *2 visualization.

Set pressure *2

Enable or disable set pressure *2 visualization.

Class Based Range

Enable or disable class based range visualization.

Tip: Modify values directly in the table cells • Click '+' to add new rows • Click Trash to remove
